gigapan.description:
All up and down the street hipsters paused and took cell phone pictures of the incredible sky.

The color is an artifact of the exposure settings I used, but the clouds were amazing.  More than 
one person talked about the movie Ghostbusters, and the stay puff marshmallow man.
